use_cases: Displaying collections of images in an interactive grid layout
Showcasing portfolio or product images with click-to-expand functionality
Creating media-rich content cards with titles, descriptions, and actions
Building responsive image galleries for websites and applications
Organizing visual content with consistent card-based UI patterns
ai_summary: A set of reusable Card components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter) styled with Tailwind CSS for building interactive image galleries. These components follow a clean, flat design with rounded corners, subtle borders, and shadow styling. Part of a larger interactive image gallery system from Ruixen.UI, designed for displaying media content in organized, accessible card layouts across desktop and mobile platforms.
